## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Start([Start])
  SetOpts["set -euo pipefail"]
  ResolveRoot["ROOT_PROJECT ← git rev-parse --show-toplevel"]
  SetPaths["BUILD_DIR = ROOT_PROJECT/build\nTOOLS_DIR = BUILD_DIR/tools\nCHART_DIR = ROOT_PROJECT/charts/adot-exporter-for-eks-on-ec2\nexport PATH=TOOLS_DIR:$PATH"]
  InitArray["FAILED_V3 = []"]
  Echo["Print: Chart validation CHART_DIR with Helm v3"]
  Template["Run: helmv3 template CHART_DIR | kubeval"]
  AppendFail["On failure: FAILED_V3 += CHART_DIR"]
  Check{"FAILED_V3 length == 0?"}
  Success["Print: All charts passed validation tests!\nexit 0"]
  PrintHeader["Print: Helm v3:"]
  PrintLoop["For each chart in FAILED_V3 -> printf \"%40s ❌\""]
  End([End])

  Start --> SetOpts
  SetOpts --> ResolveRoot
  ResolveRoot --> SetPaths
  SetPaths --> InitArray
  InitArray --> Echo
  Echo --> Template
  Template -->|success| Check
  Template -->|failure| AppendFail
  AppendFail --> Check
  Check -->|yes| Success
  Check -->|no| PrintHeader
  PrintHeader --> PrintLoop
  Success --> End
  PrintLoop --> End
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
  class Script {
    +set -euo pipefail
    +ROOT_PROJECT
    +BUILD_DIR
    +TOOLS_DIR
    +CHART_DIR
    +PATH_exported
    +FAILED_V3[]
    +runValidation()
  }
  class Helmv3 {
    +template(chart)
  }
  class Kubeval {
    +validate(manifest)
  }
  class FailedArray {
    +add(chart)
    +length()
  }

  Script --> Helmv3 : runs
  Script --> Kubeval : pipes stdout to
  Helmv3 --> Kubeval : output
  Script --> FailedArray : appends on failure
  Script ..> FailedArray : checks length
```
